reviews.author: Madhuri
reviews.body: Absolutely love the Pyrite Hanumana Diwali Combo.

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
🔱 Pyrite Hanuman Diwali Combo

Celebrate this Diwali with the strength, courage, and protection of Lord Hanuman, paired with the illuminating energy of a crystal candle. The Pyrite Hanuman Diwali Combo combines divine blessings with the natural shielding and prosperity powers of Pyrite, creating a perfect festive offering.

This combo includes:

• 
🕯️ 1 Crystal Candle – spreading light, positivity, and warmth.

• 
🌟 Pyrite Hanuman Idol – symbol of strength, devotion, and protection, crafted in shimmering Pyrite, the “Crystal of Wealth”

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Brings protection from negative energies and evil eye.

Strengthens willpower, courage, and focus.

Invites prosperity and balance into the home.

Perfect for Diwali rituals, décor, and auspicious gifting.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Light the crystal candle during pooja or meditation for peace and positivity.

Place the Pyrite Hanuman idol in your mandir, workspace, or living area to attract abundance and remove negativity.

Ideal as a festive gift for loved ones.
